sourcesContent: import React from 'react'¥nimport { Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom'¥nimport MasterLayout from '../layouts/MasterLayout'¥nimport Home from '../views/Home'¥n¥nconst About = React.lazy(() => import('../views/About'))¥nconst Contact = React.lazy(() => import('../views/Contact'))¥nconst Admin = React.lazy(() => import('../views/Admin'))¥nconst Users = React.lazy(() => import('../views/admin/Users'))¥nconst Settings = React.lazy(() => import('../views/admin/Settings'))¥nconst Profile = React.lazy(() => import('../views/admin/Profile'))¥nconst NotFound = React.lazy(() => import('../views/NotFound'))¥n¥nfunction index() {¥n  return (¥n    <>¥n      <Routes>¥n        <Route path='/' element={<MasterLayout />} >¥n          <Route index element={<Home />} />¥n          <Route path='' /> element={<Home />} />¥n        </Route>¥n      </Routes>¥n    </>¥n  )¥n}¥n¥nexport default index¥n
